title: ferulago carduchorum
intro: Ferulago carduchorum, a perennial herb belonging to the carrot family, is native to the mountainous regions of Iran and Iraq. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ferulago carduchorum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Ferulago carduchorum include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
